claim: How-to note: You must inspect the project intent from this prompt: DinoBrain new-PC install must recreate the same OS behavior from GitHub/app/data, configure Codex and Claude MCP/hooks, create Observatory and verifier launchers, avoid unsafe overwrite, support reinstall/uninstall/purge, and prove release ZIP/SHA/tag/manifest parity.
